title: ophrys tenthredinifera var. sanctae-marcellae
intro: Ophrys tenthredinifera var. sanctae-marcellae, also known as the bee orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. The medicinal properties of this plant are not well-documented, but it is said to have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Ophrys tenthredinifera var. sanctae-marcellae are also not well-documented, but it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are not commonly available, and its use is largely restricted to traditional or folk medicine.
